description: Search the Locus plugin registry by natural-language query, plugin id, name, summary, author, or tag. Use this when the /plugin request asks to find, discover, compare, or install a plugin but the exact registry id is not already confirmed.

query.description: Search text from the user's natural-language /plugin request, such as a capability, plugin name, tag, author, or exact plugin id.

registryBaseUrl.description: Optional registry base URL. Omit to use the official Locus plugin registry.

limit.description: Maximum result count, clamped to 1-50. Default is 20.
